race.comment: HOME MISSILE (8) Home Affairs gelding out of Royal Missile on debut for the Archibald yard. Has shown enough in the two trials to suggest he can run a forward race. MONOCRU (12) settled well off the pace last start then made steady ground to finish fourth over 1000m at Hawkesbury. Ready to peak after three runs back and is a serious threat. DIVINE TIMING (11) returns from a break. Ran eighth in a trial at Warwick Farm. Opened last campaign with a second at this track over 1100m. Can feature. THRONEBOUND (9) Home Affairs colt from the stakes-winning mare Princess Of Queens. Ran fourth at recent trial. In the mix.
